text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and Yaeno Muteki are training
deep in the mountains today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You don't have enough force! You'll never be
able to break the rock if you don't let go of your
fear!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Argh! Why?! Why can't I dash more than thirty
centimeters across the water?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You need more spirit! Even if you start to sink,
don't give up and just keep running!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Is this as far as you can go? You're still a long way
from becoming the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's... not... TRUE! This isn't where my dreams
end! I'll definitely, absolutely...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Learn the secret technique from that manga!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That kind of red-hot maneuver is exactly what I'm
missing!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. Now that's the Bamboo I know.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, I was taken aback when you
asked me to teach you special techniques.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But how could I not be moved seeing you work so
hard to bring a technique to life, even if it is mere
fiction?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I promise I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now, this may seem sudden, but we'll need to go
skydiving for the next bit of training...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I believe Ardan has a private helicopter. Shall we
go ask her?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Bamboo Memory tries out one daring
training technique after another, learning many
things along the way.
